# deploy-to-forge
Description: Deploys a project to The Forge, including repository setup, code push, file upload, and container initiation.
Source: project
1. Create a new GitHub repository for the project.
2. Push the project's source code and configuration files to the newly created repository.
3. Initiate a new project within The Forge platform.
4. Clean up any auto-generated or unnecessary build files from the project directory.
5. Upload all required source files, assets, and configuration files to the Forge project.
6. Start the project's container, specifying the desired runtime environment and listening port.
7. Access the provided live preview URL to confirm the successful deployment and functionality of the application.
